name: Natural Selection University
short_description: Survive 100 days at Natural Selection University and write a world-changing thesis in this challenging strategy simulation game! Balance time, resources, and sanity as you navigate harsh conditions, random disasters, and absurd campus events.
detailed_description:
《Natural Selection University》 is a challenging strategy simulation game where every decision matters. As a student in a ruthless academic world, your goal is to survive 100 days, manage limited resources, and complete a groundbreaking thesis.

【Key Features】

  • Deep Strategic Gameplay: Carefully plan each day—allocate time between studying, gathering supplies, and resting to maintain health and mental stability. Every choice impacts your survival.

  • Dynamic Challenges: Face sudden events that test your adaptability.

  • Resource Management: Balance limited resources—manage your budget to stay afloat.

  • Humor: Experience a unique blend of absurd humor and serious challenges.

【About Us】
Developer: 布袋 (Budai)
Art: Outsourced
Music: Music Atelier Amacha
